heading: About TokoHPL
intro: TokoHPL is the authorized dealer for two leading HPL (High Pressure Laminate) brands — EDL HPL and Lamitak HPL — serving Indonesia's interior industry professionals with excellent service and reliable nationwide delivery.

features.title: Authorized Dealer
features.body: We are the authorized EDL and Lamitak dealer in Indonesia, guaranteeing the authenticity and quality of every product we supply.

features.title: Excellent Service
features.body: Our team is dedicated to attentive, professional support — helping you find the right HPL solution for your project.

features.title: Fast Response
features.body: We respond promptly to every inquiry via WhatsApp, so you get the information you need without delay.

features.title: Nationwide Delivery
features.body: We deliver reliably to every corner of Indonesia through trusted logistics partners.

materialP1: HPL (High Pressure Laminate) is a high-pressure, paper-based decorative surface material widely used across the furniture, interior, and construction industries. It's known for strong resistance to scratches, moisture, and heat, and comes in an extensive range of designs.
materialP2: We supply HPL across three main categories: wood grain (woods), decorative patterns (patterns), and solid colors (solids) — in sizes and thicknesses suited to professional project standards.
servicesP1: We serve interior designers, contractors, furniture makers, and individuals looking for quality HPL materials, backed by a responsive team ready to recommend the right products for your project.
servicesP2: For product consultations or further information, reach out to us via WhatsApp for a fast response — details available on our Contact page.
